meta.title: ShipStack - Production Code Template
meta.description: Launch a polished marketing site, API, and app from one production-ready template.

hero.subtitle: Premium starter stack for SaaS teams
hero.title: Launch faster with a polished baseline your customers can trust from day one
hero.description: ShipStack combines Astro marketing, a React app shell, and backend conventions so your team can move directly from idea to signup-ready product delivery.

logoCloud.title: Fits the stack your team already uses

featuresSection.subtitle: Template architecture
featuresSection.title: A clear foundation you can ship and evolve
featuresSection.description: The template mirrors how real teams work: composable UI blocks, organized app boundaries, and upgrade-friendly conventions across the stack.
featuresSection.insightDescription: Use an opinionated folder structure and reusable sections to launch quickly without painting yourself into a corner six weeks later.
featuresSection.deliveryTitle: Grow without rewriting your marketing stack
featuresSection.deliveryDescription: As your design system evolves, marketing pages keep pace with shared tokens and components, so brand and product stay aligned.

testimonial.quote: We replaced two weeks of setup with one afternoon and shipped our first customer-facing flow in the same sprint.

video.title: See how the template works end to end
video.description: This walkthrough shows how marketing, app, and API pieces fit together. Replace this embed with your own product demo when you launch.

bento.title: Everything you need to move from idea to launch
bento.description: Start with a complete baseline, then adapt only what matters for your product and team workflow.

cells.title: Composable marketing sections
cells.description: Hero, social proof, feature rows, pricing, FAQ, and CTA blocks built to mix and match.

cells.title: Great developer experience
cells.description: Sane defaults for scripts, workspace structure, and shared tooling from day one.

cells.title: Documentation-friendly setup
cells.description: Clear conventions make onboarding easier for new contributors and client teams.

cells.title: Extensible by design
cells.description: Add routes, modules, and product verticals without rebuilding the foundation.

ctaBanner.title: Ready to launch with a better starting point?
ctaBanner.description: Use ShipStack as your baseline, customize the branding, and ship a polished first release faster.

items.name: Marketing site
items.description: Astro landing page template with SEO and conversion-focused sections.

items.name: Application shell
items.description: React SPA baseline with room for auth, dashboard flows, and billing states.

items.name: API service module
items.description: Backend slice starter for endpoints, services, and data access conventions.

pricing.title: Choose your plan and land on the right checkout instantly
pricing.description: Every pricing CTA carries checkout intent so visitors start signup with the exact plan they selected.

tiers.name: Solo
tiers.description: Best for indie builders and MVP teams who need a clean production template quickly.

tiers.name: Team
tiers.description: For product teams that want shared conventions and a scalable base across projects.

faq.title: Questions teams ask before adopting ShipStack
faq.description: Everything you need to know before using the template for your next launch.

items.question: What do I get in the template?
items.answer: You get a marketing site structure, app baseline, and backend conventions you can extend for your product.

items.question: Can I fully rebrand this?
items.answer: Yes. Replace copy, assets, and tokens while keeping the same component structure and deployment flow.

items.question: How are updates handled?
items.answer: Keep your product code in your own modules and pull template improvements selectively as your stack evolves.

items.question: Is this only for SaaS products?
items.answer: No. It is designed for any product team that wants a fast, structured starting point for web delivery.

whySection.subtitle: Why ShipStack
whySection.title: A template built for speed, consistency, and ownership
whySection.description: Ship quickly without sacrificing maintainability or design quality.

cards.title: Move faster from day one
cards.description: Start from a practical architecture instead of spending your first sprint on boilerplate.

cards.title: Stay consistent across surfaces
cards.description: Use shared components and patterns so marketing and product feel like one brand.

cards.title: Own your stack end to end
cards.description: Everything is customizable so your team can evolve the template into your long-term product.

footer.description: Production-minded code template for teams shipping web products.
footer.attribution: Built with the shared design system and ready to customize for your brand.
